item.title: 監察院廢不廢？為什麼會想要廢考監！？The Correction and Impeachment Power of Taiwan|#我的學習筆記 #528 ‪‪‪‪‪@mynotebooks
item.itunes:title: 監察院廢不廢？為什麼會想要廢考監！？The Correction and Impeachment Power of Taiwan|#我的學習筆記 #528 ‪‪‪‪‪@mynotebooks
item.itunes:author: 我的學習筆記
item.itunes:summary:
Hello everyone! I am Aniu. Recent calls for congressional reform. I can only say it was a grand event! Some people say it is congressional reform. Some people also say that it is the legislators' expansion of power. But all this is controversial. Of course, we also want to do this topic. But the amount of data is too large. Please allow us to let the bullets fly for a while! One side's argument. It means that legislators need investigative powers. Their claim is that. The power of the Supervisory Yuan is not obvious. It's an idle organization. Or has it become the East Factory? And arguments like thugs. But is this really the case? Let’s talk about the Supervisory Commission today! First, let’s talk about. The original intention of establishing the Supervisory Yuan. Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the country,. led the Chinese revolution. The world's democratic countries can be roughly divided into. Presidential and Cabinet Systems. However, our country's constitution was written. by Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the country. It is said to combine the advantages of cabinet system. and presidential system. The separation of three powers was changed to five powers. Added a comparison. The system applicable to China. That is, the right to examine and the right to supervise. The right to take the exam is to avoid. Administrative organs commit corruption for personal gain. Therefore, separate the test and use. Separate examination authority from administrative authority. The power of supervision is to prevent abuse by Congress. Therefore, referring to the ancient imperial censor system. Separate the Control Yuan from Congress. Forming a five-power constitution that is unique in the world. So we have the Executive Yuan and the Legislative Yuan. Judicial Yuan, Examination Yuan. The Board of Audit and Inspection and other five agencies. According to the principle of separation of five powers in the Constitution. The Supervisory Yuan is responsible for political conduct and rectification. It also supervises audits, property declarations, etc. Clarify the issues of official administration,. eliminate malpractices and promote benefits. The 17th year of the Republic of China. The Northern Expedition was completed and the country was unified. The National Government began. to implement the five-power separation. At the very beginning. The Court of Auditors. The Supervisory Yuan was established in 1931. And abolished the Audit Office. Became the Audit Department. Affiliated to the Supervisory Yuan. This is the highest supervisory body of the National Government. Exercise of impeachment and audit powers. After 26 years of war against Japan. Master the two powers of reporting and making suggestions. Constitution of the Republic of China. It came into effect on December 25, 1947. According to the provisions of the Constitution. By the provincial and municipal councils, Mongolia. Tibetan Local Council. Overseas Chinese groups also elected the first Supervisory Committee. And on June 5, 1948. The Control Yuan after the Constitution was formally established. At the very beginning of the Constitution. The Supervisory Yuan in various regions and provinces. Each district has its own supervisory committee office. April 1949. The Supervisory Yuan first moved from Nanjing to Guangzhou. What happened in 1938? Everyone knows it. December: Government transferred to Taiwan. After the official start of work. The original 180 members. Supervisory committee members who have come to Taiwan. Only 104 people. But after arriving in Taiwan. Do you think they are starting to enjoy their life? Actually, no. These supervisory committee members are not idle. The most famous one is. In 1952. They impeached the then Vice President Li Zongren. The reason is that Li Zongren, acting president,. violated the law and failed to perform his duties. But in fact, after the government moved to Taiwan. He never came to Taiwan. People are still in the United States!

Although Li Ge went to the United States. I want to form a third force. But that's another story. Audiences who want to listen. Welcome to leave a message and hit +1. After the Republic of China government moved to Taiwan. In order to maintain the "legal authority" over the whole of China. National Assembly, Legislative Yuan and Control Yuan. There has never been a re-election. Only a few additional elections have been held. But as representatives of public opinion, they. However, he actually governed Taiwan, Penghu, Kinmen, and Matsu. Long-term underrepresentation. Therefore, it was ridiculed as the "Eternal Parliament" It also triggered the subsequent "Wild Lily Student Movement" year 1991. National Assembly re-election. Representatives to the National Assembly after the next election. The first ad hoc meeting was held. Resolution passed the Second Amendment to the Constitution. of the Republic of China. The election method of the Supervisory Committee. Nomination by the President. The National Assembly agreed. and give personnel consent. returned to the National Assembly. Since then, the Supervisory Yuan. It no longer has the character of a public opinion institution. Of course, after the second constitutional amendment. I have investigated several cases. It has attracted public attention. For example, Supervisory Commissioner Zhao Changping once investigated. The case of Huang Guozhang, a sailor on the Nanyang ship,. falling into the water. He based his analysis on the only four photos of the corpse. After zooming in on one of the photos. Found on Huang Guozhang's head. Two steel nails were inserted. Became an important piece of evidence in the Huang Guozhang case. Opened up the public. Voices of concern about military discipline and human rights. The Supervisory Yuan also once targeted. A lone soldier stranded in the mountains of northern Thailand. Speak up for their descendants. Those who did not have legal status. Stateless refugees. It was also under the supervision of our Supervisory Commission. Corrected the bureaucracy's incompetence. And let the descendants of these isolated northern Thai soldiers. Able to obtain legal status. Living in Taiwan today. Of course, after talking about these great achievements. It’s time to talk about the main event. Why the Supervisory Commission? Will people say it's ineffective? As mentioned earlier, in 1991. National Assembly re-election. At the same time, the Supervisory Committee members are elected. Transformed into a presidential nomination. The National Assembly agreed. As a result, the Supervisory Commission lost. The nature of our public institutions. As a result, they lost their representatives. Unique freedom of speech. And the privilege of not being arrested. Then in 2000. The Sixth Constitutional Amendment. The National Assembly. Controversy over constitutional amendments. The power of personnel approval was transferred to the Legislative Yuan. Judicial, Examination and Supervisory Courts. Personnel case of the president and vice president. Therefore, the President nominates. The Legislative Yuan agrees to decide. But with our National Assembly. After the 7th constitutional amendment was abolished. The Legislative Yuan became the only parliament. The Republic of China was thus established. Unicameral Congressional system. That is to say. The Control Yuan during Martial Law. Although it has the nature of a congress. But under the rule of the party-state. Political realities prevent it from taking effect. It should have the performance. After the lifting of martial law. The Control Yuan will soon be. It has lost its character as a public opinion institution. Lost his parliamentary status. Many powers have been removed. The original power of the Supervisory Committee was quite great. It is also responsible for the president, vice president. and grand justice of the Judicial Yuan. The president, vice president, and examination committee members. of the Examination Yuan.

Exercise of consent etc. But all these things were taken away by the Legislative Yuan. After all, they are no longer a representative body. And there is no way. You should review your own personnel approval rights yourself? Otherwise, you will become a referee or referee. It's all about self-enrichment among one's own people! The Supervisory Commission at that time. Even has the power to impeach the president. But after the constitutional amendment. The relevant powers have changed. And the power to impeach the president. It has also been transferred to the Legislative Yuan. The current Supervisory Commission. The only thing left is impeachment and denunciation of public institutions. Auditing power and the function of receiving people's letters. It can be said that there is a problem with the design. No one will help him take care of his body the day after tomorrow. And kept taking away the useful parts of his body. Now it has become a. A toothless tiger. When the Control Yuan no longer represents public opinion. The nomination process. Most of the time it is political considerations. So how can he go well? Supervise officials for us the people. And what about the public servants who spend our tax dollars? Under such a system. The Supervisory Commission does not have sufficient checks and balances. To check and balance the four parallel courts at other levels. Of course it will be said that the function is not good enough! Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the Republic of China. The original intention of establishing the five institutes was. The five hospitals are all pets raised by the people. These five pets. Each has its own special means to check and balance. Can supervise each other. But now one of. Majestic tiger. The tooth was suddenly pulled out. That way he can continue to maintain. Is that his original function? Now the remaining weapons of the Supervisory Council. Only the power to impeach a person. There is also the "right to correct the matter" But you know that the power of impeachment. Need to be further subdivided? According to the Supervision Law. According to the provisions of the Civil Service Disciplinary Law. my country's impeachment system. Divided into "impeachment power" and "punishment power" and respectively by the supervisory authorities. The judiciary also has. When our supervisory committee. After the impeachment vote. Impeachment must be brought to the disciplinary court. The disciplinary court will then look at the specific content. of the impeachment. Judging these civil servants. Is it really illegal or negligent? and decide what disciplinary action he should receive. simply put. The Supervisory Commission now has a very big gun. But the problem is that he has no bullets. We have to ask the Judicial Yuan for the bullets. When the Supervisory Committee found. In the event of illegality or negligence. The Supervisory Commission only has the authority to shoot. As for whether the bullet was fired. Shooting someone, or hitting a vital spot, etc. The Supervisory Commission has no right to decide. I have finished talking about the power. of impeachment against people. Now let's talk about the right to correct things. When the Control Yuan is against the Executive Yuan. Or other relevant ministries. After the correction bill was passed. We can only urge this agency. Just need to pay more attention and improve. The most serious thing is just. Request a written report from the agency. Let me tell you about this correction. Fixed those errors. But if there is no improvement or no response. The Supervisory Commission can only call you in for questioning. No other means of coercion exist. Plus an official. If it is clearly illegal today. Impeachment is relatively easy. But if he hadn't broken the law today. Rather, it is a case of "negligence" This is more troublesome. Here is a practical situation. There was a typhoon. The reservoir is too full.

Prepare for flood discharge. But according to convention. Announcement before flood discharge. Avoid people downstream. Caused loss of life and property. But because the rainfall that time exceeded expectations. Civil servants on duty. Because of the emergency, we chose to release the flood directly. Caused financial loss to the people. But if he doesn't release the flood. The entire reservoir will exceed the water storage capacity. It caused the dam to burst. So you say this civil servant. Was he derelict in his duty? Of course, this person was given a warning in the end. So impeachment must depend on the case. And each unit and individual. The standards of conduct are different. Does this person have. Should pay attention but not pay attention. Sometimes it’s hard to tell. Therefore, impeachment must be done appropriately. Not too difficult. This is also a headache for the Supervisory Committee. Other targets of impeachment and accusation. Because it’s “people”. The target of punishment should be very clear. But if a fraud case. Because it involves a long history and complex levels. If the final resolution. Only some officials involved in serious cases were impeached. Let go of other relevant people. It is easy to cause controversy. There is still room for a big article. Plus the situation of the case. Temporary. for example. Someone wants to expose a certain civil servant. for violating the law. But he must want to make this matter. The bigger the noise, the better. Not just the Supervisory Commission. Various news media will also receive the tip-off. Say a civil servant violated the law. at this time. The media wanted to grab the exclusive. So we will expose the news as soon as possible. So when the news reached the head of Unit Yuan. The manager will definitely want to stop the loss immediately. Suspend this civil servant immediately. Results and complaints to the Supervisory Committee. There's not really much difference. That's why. Many complaints were made before they were filed. It will die in the womb first. I have finished talking about this toothless tiger. Why is it said to be ineffective? Next, let’s talk about. Let’s talk about the origin of abolishing the Supervisory Commission! In 1993. Chen Shui-bian is still a legislator. Hong Qichang also believes. The Supervisory Yuan after the Constitutional Amendment. It is no longer part of Congress. Therefore, the identity of the Supervisory Committee. Representatives of the people should. Become a civil servant. This shift will make the operation of supervisory power. Becoming "internal supervision of the public service system" In addition, the Supervisory Committee. No longer enjoy the right to free speech. and without the privilege of arrest. It is hard to expect them to be effective. To supervise the administrative organs. therefore. Constitutional Powers of the Control Yuan. There should also be corresponding adjustments. At that time, Hong Qichang thought. Since the Supervisory Commission no longer has these powers. So why don't we imitate. Parliaments of other countries. The investigation power and supervisory power of the Supervisory Yuan. Are they all guilty of returning to the Legislative Yuan? Implementing “external supervision” of Congress. But Brother Bian thinks. The Control Yuan can continue to enjoy supervisory powers. To supervise the civil servants. But the power of investigation is the legislative power of Congress. Of course, there must be necessary auxiliary powers. Legislative members complete legislative amendments. and budget resolutions. Administrative supervision and personnel approval, etc. Of considerable importance. So I hope the right to investigate. This should be the power that the Legislative Yuan should have.

So in the same year. The Chief Justice also has Constitutional Interpretation No. 325. The Constitution on the Supervisory Yuan. There are only these two left. A weapon that's not very powerful. You have to steal his weapons. But the Legislative Yuan seems to be right. The Legislative Yuan is required to carry out relevant tasks. There must be some tools. So a special explanation. The Legislative Yuan has the right to access files. Of course, Brother Niu has simplified it a lot. But if you want to see the original text. You can go and take a look at it again! So in 1999. Passed the Legislative Yuan Powers Exercise Act. Inquiries and committee hearings. The right to access files is also included. Now let's fast forward in time. In 2004. That year was the presidential election. The "319 shooting incident" also broke out. In the end, although the suspect Chen Yixiong died. The case was concluded with. "the defendant's death" and no prosecution was signed. But the truth of the case is still confusing. Moreover, the vote difference was not big at that time. Between the various camps. It is also because the truth cannot be revealed. I hate it so much that my teeth itch. One side feels. After this incident. There are many more sympathy votes. Caused them to lose the election. But the other side also feels. He doesn't have to win the election. Such a risky political performance. So for this reason, the Legislative Yuan. Formed a 319 truth investigation team. This led to a constitutional controversy. Made by the Grand Justice of the Judiciary. Interpretation No. 585 Change of Opinion. The Legislative Yuan’s investigative power. Should not be limited to document access. It should include. Ask people or government officials to. Be present to give testimony or express an opinion. It's just that the relevant procedures should. be clearly defined by law. The scope and rules need to be clearly defined by law. Even if rights are granted, there must be certain restrictions. However, the Legislative Yuan has. No corresponding laws have been passed. This power cannot be implemented. This is also the latest congressional reform. The main thing in dispute. Since the Chief Justice has affirmed. The Legislative Yuan and the Control Yuan. can exercise investigative powers. So today's Legislative Yuan. The problem of weak investigative powers. It seems that the Legislative Yuan. Failure to improve legislation. The existence or abolition of the Supervisory Yuan. It doesn't seem to matter much. But here comes the problem! That's still possible. Causes big problems. Preset the better situation first. The result of the two houses sharing investigative power. Might lead to the same thing. Being investigated by both the Legislative Yuan. and the Control Yuan. This is not only a waste of national resources. It will also make the respondents exhausted. Need to accept investigations from both houses. Think of the worst case scenario. If the two houses' findings. Or the decisions they make are contradictory. Which court’s conclusion should be taken as the standard? Which house should the people trust? This is how we judge the government's political responsibility. The Democratic Progressive Party. has always supported the independence of the three powers. Advocate the abolition of the Examination Yuan. and the Supervisory Commission. Former President Tsai Ing-wen. When running for re-election, he also said. Constitutional reform abolished the Examination Yuan. The Supervisory Commission can also give priority to. Including Chen Tingfei, who was re-elected as a legislator. for several. He also proposed constitutional amendments several times. "Abolish the Examination Yuan and the Control Yuan" But they are all stillborn.

But when it comes to the Supervisory Commission. There is another controversy that must be mentioned. That was the end of 2004. The term of office of the third supervisory committee expires. The then President Chen Shui-bian. Also in accordance with the Constitution. and the provisions of the Constitutional Amendment. Nominate 29 people to the Legislative Yuan. List of Supervisory Committee Members. At that time, the Legislative Yuan. Term of office of the 5th Legislative Yuan. Only one month left. The ruling Democratic Progressive Party. The total number of seats held by the Taiwan Solidarity Union,. the pan-green camp. Only about 100 seats. No more than half. Therefore, the Kuomintang and the People First Party. They hold more than half of the seats. Not in the term. Exercise the consent power of the Supervisory Committee. After the 6th Legislative Yuan took office. Although the Presidential Palace once again. The nomination letter was sent to the Legislative Yuan. But you know. Because our Nationalist Alliance. Still holds more than half of the seats. Leading the proceedings. The Legislative Yuan's agenda was postponed several times. Therefore, the Supervisory Committee did not exercise its consent. As a result, at the end of January 2005. After the 3rd Supervisory Committee expires. The Supervisory Commission has fallen into. an idle state without a Supervisory Committee. This also angered the Democratic Progressive Party. Apply to the Chief Justice for a Constitutional Interpretation. So two years later. The Grand Justice provided an interpretation. of Interpretation No. 632. Declared the Legislative Yuan's failure to exercise. its consent unconstitutional. Deemed the Legislative Yuan to have undermined the constitutional system. Seriously request the Legislative Yuan. Take appropriate action as soon as possible. But when is the Legislative Yuan. How can the Supervisory Commission. no longer be a mosquito-ridden institution? The answer is after the change of political parties in 2008. The Ma Ying-jeou government. Provide relevant list of supervisory committee members. This finally ended the Supervisory Commission. The case of idling for 3 years and 6 months. But the list of candidates for the fourth supervisory committee. It's also full of controversy. For example, there were reports. of sexual harassment of female students. There is Xu Bingjin who evaded taxes. Chen Yaochang, who had an affair scandal. As for the candidates for the 5th Supervisory Committee in 2014,. Even people in his own party couldn't stand it. More than one-third of the members nominated by Ma Ying-jeou. A total of 11 nominees were eliminated. Symbolizes the ruling and opposition legislators. Strong backlash against Ma Ying-jeou's inappropriate nomination. Based on the proportion of legislators at that time. Assuming that the Democratic Progressive Party. and the People First Party. If everyone votes against. At least 9 digits are required. KMT legislators voted against. Appointment of the Supervisory Committee will not be passed. The subsequent 2016 supplementary nomination. And the candidates for the 6th Supervisory Committee in 2020. Each time it was passed amid controversy. This shows that the personnel case of the Supervisory Committee. It is inherently political. It is difficult to escape the political party's attack and defense. Naturally, it is hard to expect. Their professionalism and independence. But this quarrel. It also gave the people a voice. Eh? The Control Yuan, one of the five branches of government. It has been idle for three years and six months. But there doesn't seem to be any special feeling. So the voices for abolishing the Supervisory Yuan. Therefore, it is getting bigger and bigger. Of course, this. Political parties have not stopped discussing. For example, the Kuomintang. Questioning the DPP's advocacy of abolishing the examination. and procuratorate. But when in power. But the examination committee members. and the supervisory committee members. Yes, it is good to mention it.

However, without constitutional amendment. Before the abolition of the Supervisory Yuan. The power of supervision still exists. According to the results of the Supreme Court's interpretation. of the Constitution. The President and Congress have an obligation. Nomination and review must be carried out in accordance. with the Constitution. It is the president's duty. to nominate the examination committee members. More than just rights. So if the president is passive and doesn't nominate. Or our Legislative Yuan. Passive non-exercise of consent. It will make it impossible for the Supervisory Commission. to exercise its powers. It is the destruction of the country's constitutional system. It is not allowed by the Constitution. Although the interpretation of No. 632. It is aimed at the Supervisory Commission. But the Examination Yuan is also a constitutional institution. So of course it also applies. Or as mentioned before. Now the issue is raised again. Want to compare the economical mode. Freeze personnel first. Ways to reduce your budget. Let the two examination and supervision institutes become history. But everyone! When the province was streamlined,. the constitution was amended first. Give the economy legal legitimacy. So no matter which mode you choose. The constitution must be amended! Finally, let's talk. We think the Supervisory Commission. Should it be abolished or not? Our Supervisory Commission. Just like this,. Acquired disorders. Even though the tooth was extracted. But it is still in a difficult situation. To clarify the overall governance. Make certain contributions to safeguarding human rights. Although the Supervisory Commission has been in operation till now. Constantly constrained by institutional deficiencies. Make bricks without straw. I want to do things but I don't have the tools. The Supervisory Commission has already become. People are facing mismanagement. or when treated unfairly. Our important complaint channel. Here is some data for you guys. Our current supervisory committee. Every year, the. More than 18,000 petition letters. This is also a good thing for our administrative organs. When implementing policies. Able to be reinvestigated and reviewed. In the process of supervising administration. The Supervisory Commission provides us with. Guarantee of relatively good administration. Therefore, international monitoring organizations. Actively promote in countries around the world. Establish an independent and professional monitoring body. The issue of whether to abolish or retain the Control Yuan. It’s not a multiple-choice question of “keep” or “discard”. It's a rather important question. We have to think carefully. Big Questions about Government Syste. and Checks and Balances. If we want to abolish the Supervisory Yuan. Transfer of power to the Legislative Yuan. Give the Legislative Yuan full congressional powers. You have to think carefully about that. How to make corresponding checks and balances. Thinking deeply. How to design a. Implementing the system of supervisory power. and safeguarding human rights. If it's not useless,. Should the Supervisory Commission be asked to. Re-attach its teeth? Improve the selection system. Let it execute well. What about the rights granted to it by the people? These are our problems. It must be carefully expanded and examined. Rather than just following the political offensive and defensive. Just go with the flow. Okay! That’s all for today. If you like. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership.

Or click Super Thanks! In addition, our DC group is now open! Welcome everyone to come in and chat. My study notes. See you next time. ByeBye！

最近國會改革的聲浪

只能說是轟轟烈烈啊！

有些人說是國會改革

也有人說是立委擴權

但這一切都眾說紛紜

其中一方的論點

是說立委需要調查權

他們的主張是因為

監察院的權力不彰

算是個閒置組織

或是已經淪為東廠

以及打手之類的論調

但事情真的是這樣嗎

今天就來讓我們聊聊監察院！

#台灣 #臺灣 #中華民國 #中國 #立法院 #監察院 #三民主義 #五權分立 #考試院 #立法 #監察 #質詢 #監督 #彈劾 #糾舉 #審計 #廢考監 #東廠 #陳菊 #監察委員 #大法官 #事件 #585號 #青鳥 #青鳥行動 #藍鷹

資料來源：

黎淑慧（2018）。談立法院調查權。《管理資訊計算》，第 7 卷，

陳清雲（2015）。立法院調查權法制化之立法建議。《軍法專刊》，第 61 卷

李寧修（2018）。論國會調查權的革新與展望。《政大法評論》，第 154 期

吳秀玲（2006）。論我國監察權的演變與未來發展方向。《國家發展研究》

呂文玲(2020)。廢止監察院及其職權移轉之修憲方向研析。《立法院法制局研究成果議題研析》

東方翔（2021）。我國監察委員行使糾正權和彈劾權之實證分析。國立政治大學政治學系碩士學位論文

黃揚明(2017)。那些年　被立法院刷掉的監委總整理（上）。鏡傳媒《https://www.mirrormedia.mg/story/20170303inv001》

黃揚明(2017)。那些年　被立法院刷掉的監委總整理（下）。鏡傳媒《https://www.mirrormedia.mg/story/20170303inv002》

李宜芳（2020）。四張圖表告訴你 為民伸冤的監察院為何不受信任。https://reurl.cc/3j59Wj

法律白話文運動(2022)。先天不良又後天失調的監察院，廢了它？《法律白話文運動》https://plainlaw.me/posts/Control-Yuan

item.description:
Hello everyone! I am Aniu. Recent calls for congressional reform. I can only say it was a grand event! Some people say it is congressional reform. Some people also say that it is the legislators' expansion of power. But all this is controversial. Of course, we also want to do this topic. But the amount of data is too large. Please allow us to let the bullets fly for a while! One side's argument. It means that legislators need investigative powers. Their claim is that. The power of the Supervisory Yuan is not obvious. It's an idle organization. Or has it become the East Factory? And arguments like thugs. But is this really the case? Let’s talk about the Supervisory Commission today! First, let’s talk about. The original intention of establishing the Supervisory Yuan. Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the country,. led the Chinese revolution. The world's democratic countries can be roughly divided into. Presidential and Cabinet Systems. However, our country's constitution was written. by Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the country. It is said to combine the advantages of cabinet system. and presidential system. The separation of three powers was changed to five powers. Added a comparison. The system applicable to China. That is, the right to examine and the right to supervise. The right to take the exam is to avoid. Administrative organs commit corruption for personal gain. Therefore, separate the test and use. Separate examination authority from administrative authority. The power of supervision is to prevent abuse by Congress. Therefore, referring to the ancient imperial censor system. Separate the Control Yuan from Congress. Forming a five-power constitution that is unique in the world. So we have the Executive Yuan and the Legislative Yuan. Judicial Yuan, Examination Yuan. The Board of Audit and Inspection and other five agencies. According to the principle of separation of five powers in the Constitution. The Supervisory Yuan is responsible for political conduct and rectification. It also supervises audits, property declarations, etc. Clarify the issues of official administration,. eliminate malpractices and promote benefits. The 17th year of the Republic of China. The Northern Expedition was completed and the country was unified. The National Government began. to implement the five-power separation. At the very beginning. The Court of Auditors. The Supervisory Yuan was established in 1931. And abolished the Audit Office. Became the Audit Department. Affiliated to the Supervisory Yuan. This is the highest supervisory body of the National Government. Exercise of impeachment and audit powers. After 26 years of war against Japan. Master the two powers of reporting and making suggestions. Constitution of the Republic of China. It came into effect on December 25, 1947. According to the provisions of the Constitution. By the provincial and municipal councils, Mongolia. Tibetan Local Council. Overseas Chinese groups also elected the first Supervisory Committee. And on June 5, 1948. The Control Yuan after the Constitution was formally established. At the very beginning of the Constitution. The Supervisory Yuan in various regions and provinces. Each district has its own supervisory committee office. April 1949. The Supervisory Yuan first moved from Nanjing to Guangzhou. What happened in 1938? Everyone knows it. December: Government transferred to Taiwan. After the official start of work. The original 180 members. Supervisory committee members who have come to Taiwan. Only 104 people. But after arriving in Taiwan. Do you think they are starting to enjoy their life? Actually, no. These supervisory committee members are not idle. The most famous one is. In 1952. They impeached the then Vice President Li Zongren. The reason is that Li Zongren, acting president,. violated the law and failed to perform his duties. But in fact, after the government moved to Taiwan. He never came to Taiwan. People are still in the United States!

Although Li Ge went to the United States. I want to form a third force. But that's another story. Audiences who want to listen. Welcome to leave a message and hit +1. After the Republic of China government moved to Taiwan. In order to maintain the "legal authority" over the whole of China. National Assembly, Legislative Yuan and Control Yuan. There has never been a re-election. Only a few additional elections have been held. But as representatives of public opinion, they. However, he actually governed Taiwan, Penghu, Kinmen, and Matsu. Long-term underrepresentation. Therefore, it was ridiculed as the "Eternal Parliament" It also triggered the subsequent "Wild Lily Student Movement" year 1991. National Assembly re-election. Representatives to the National Assembly after the next election. The first ad hoc meeting was held. Resolution passed the Second Amendment to the Constitution. of the Republic of China. The election method of the Supervisory Committee. Nomination by the President. The National Assembly agreed. and give personnel consent. returned to the National Assembly. Since then, the Supervisory Yuan. It no longer has the character of a public opinion institution. Of course, after the second constitutional amendment. I have investigated several cases. It has attracted public attention. For example, Supervisory Commissioner Zhao Changping once investigated. The case of Huang Guozhang, a sailor on the Nanyang ship,. falling into the water. He based his analysis on the only four photos of the corpse. After zooming in on one of the photos. Found on Huang Guozhang's head. Two steel nails were inserted. Became an important piece of evidence in the Huang Guozhang case. Opened up the public. Voices of concern about military discipline and human rights. The Supervisory Yuan also once targeted. A lone soldier stranded in the mountains of northern Thailand. Speak up for their descendants. Those who did not have legal status. Stateless refugees. It was also under the supervision of our Supervisory Commission. Corrected the bureaucracy's incompetence. And let the descendants of these isolated northern Thai soldiers. Able to obtain legal status. Living in Taiwan today. Of course, after talking about these great achievements. It’s time to talk about the main event. Why the Supervisory Commission? Will people say it's ineffective? As mentioned earlier, in 1991. National Assembly re-election. At the same time, the Supervisory Committee members are elected. Transformed into a presidential nomination. The National Assembly agreed. As a result, the Supervisory Commission lost. The nature of our public institutions. As a result, they lost their representatives. Unique freedom of speech. And the privilege of not being arrested. Then in 2000. The Sixth Constitutional Amendment. The National Assembly. Controversy over constitutional amendments. The power of personnel approval was transferred to the Legislative Yuan. Judicial, Examination and Supervisory Courts. Personnel case of the president and vice president. Therefore, the President nominates. The Legislative Yuan agrees to decide. But with our National Assembly. After the 7th constitutional amendment was abolished. The Legislative Yuan became the only parliament. The Republic of China was thus established. Unicameral Congressional system. That is to say. The Control Yuan during Martial Law. Although it has the nature of a congress. But under the rule of the party-state. Political realities prevent it from taking effect. It should have the performance. After the lifting of martial law. The Control Yuan will soon be. It has lost its character as a public opinion institution. Lost his parliamentary status. Many powers have been removed. The original power of the Supervisory Committee was quite great. It is also responsible for the president, vice president. and grand justice of the Judicial Yuan. The president, vice president, and examination committee members. of the Examination Yuan.

Exercise of consent etc. But all these things were taken away by the Legislative Yuan. After all, they are no longer a representative body. And there is no way. You should review your own personnel approval rights yourself? Otherwise, you will become a referee or referee. It's all about self-enrichment among one's own people! The Supervisory Commission at that time. Even has the power to impeach the president. But after the constitutional amendment. The relevant powers have changed. And the power to impeach the president. It has also been transferred to the Legislative Yuan. The current Supervisory Commission. The only thing left is impeachment and denunciation of public institutions. Auditing power and the function of receiving people's letters. It can be said that there is a problem with the design. No one will help him take care of his body the day after tomorrow. And kept taking away the useful parts of his body. Now it has become a. A toothless tiger. When the Control Yuan no longer represents public opinion. The nomination process. Most of the time it is political considerations. So how can he go well? Supervise officials for us the people. And what about the public servants who spend our tax dollars? Under such a system. The Supervisory Commission does not have sufficient checks and balances. To check and balance the four parallel courts at other levels. Of course it will be said that the function is not good enough! Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the Republic of China. The original intention of establishing the five institutes was. The five hospitals are all pets raised by the people. These five pets. Each has its own special means to check and balance. Can supervise each other. But now one of. Majestic tiger. The tooth was suddenly pulled out. That way he can continue to maintain. Is that his original function? Now the remaining weapons of the Supervisory Council. Only the power to impeach a person. There is also the "right to correct the matter" But you know that the power of impeachment. Need to be further subdivided? According to the Supervision Law. According to the provisions of the Civil Service Disciplinary Law. my country's impeachment system. Divided into "impeachment power" and "punishment power" and respectively by the supervisory authorities. The judiciary also has. When our supervisory committee. After the impeachment vote. Impeachment must be brought to the disciplinary court. The disciplinary court will then look at the specific content. of the impeachment. Judging these civil servants. Is it really illegal or negligent? and decide what disciplinary action he should receive. simply put. The Supervisory Commission now has a very big gun. But the problem is that he has no bullets. We have to ask the Judicial Yuan for the bullets. When the Supervisory Committee found. In the event of illegality or negligence. The Supervisory Commission only has the authority to shoot. As for whether the bullet was fired. Shooting someone, or hitting a vital spot, etc. The Supervisory Commission has no right to decide. I have finished talking about the power. of impeachment against people. Now let's talk about the right to correct things. When the Control Yuan is against the Executive Yuan. Or other relevant ministries. After the correction bill was passed. We can only urge this agency. Just need to pay more attention and improve. The most serious thing is just. Request a written report from the agency. Let me tell you about this correction. Fixed those errors. But if there is no improvement or no response. The Supervisory Commission can only call you in for questioning. No other means of coercion exist. Plus an official. If it is clearly illegal today. Impeachment is relatively easy. But if he hadn't broken the law today. Rather, it is a case of "negligence" This is more troublesome. Here is a practical situation. There was a typhoon. The reservoir is too full.

Prepare for flood discharge. But according to convention. Announcement before flood discharge. Avoid people downstream. Caused loss of life and property. But because the rainfall that time exceeded expectations. Civil servants on duty. Because of the emergency, we chose to release the flood directly. Caused financial loss to the people. But if he doesn't release the flood. The entire reservoir will exceed the water storage capacity. It caused the dam to burst. So you say this civil servant. Was he derelict in his duty? Should pay attention but not pay attention. Sometimes it’s hard to tell. Therefore, impeachment must be done appropriately. Not too difficult. This is also a headache for the Supervisory Committee. Other targets of impeachment and accusation. Because it’s “people”. The target of punishment should be very clear. But if a fraud case. Because it involves a long history and complex levels. If the final resolution. Only some officials involved in serious cases were impeached. Let go of other relevant people. It is easy to cause controversy. There is still room for a big article. Plus the situation of the case. Temporary. for example. Someone wants to expose a certain civil servant. for violating the law. But he must want to make this matter. The bigger the noise, the better. Not just the Supervisory Commission. Various news media will also receive the tip-off. Say a civil servant violated the law. at this time. The media wanted to grab the exclusive. So we will expose the news as soon as possible. So when the news reached the head of Unit Yuan. The manager will definitely want to stop the loss immediately. Suspend this civil servant immediately. Results and complaints to the Supervisory Committee. There's not really much difference. That's why. Many complaints were made before they were filed. It will die in the womb first. I have finished talking about this toothless tiger. Why is it said to be ineffective? Next, let’s talk about. Let’s talk about the origin of abolishing the Supervisory Commission! In 1993. Chen Shui-bian is still a legislator. Hong Qichang also believes. The Supervisory Yuan after the Constitutional Amendment. It is no longer part of Congress. Therefore, the identity of the Supervisory Committee. Representatives of the people should. Become a civil servant. This shift will make the operation of supervisory power. Becoming "internal supervision of the public service system" In addition, the Supervisory Committee. No longer enjoy the right to free speech. and without the privilege of arrest. It is hard to expect them to be effective. To supervise the administrative organs. therefore. Constitutional Powers of the Control Yuan. There should also be corresponding adjustments. At that time, Hong Qichang thought. Since the Supervisory Commission no longer has these powers. So why don't we imitate. Parliaments of other countries. The investigation power and supervisory power of the Supervisory Yuan. Are they all guilty of returning to the Legislative Yuan? Implementing “external supervision” of Congress. But Brother Bian thinks. The Control Yuan can continue to enjoy supervisory powers. To supervise the civil servants. But the power of investigation is the legislative power of Congress. Of course, there must be necessary auxiliary powers. Legislative members complete legislative amendments. and budget resolutions. Administrative supervision and personnel approval, etc. Of considerable importance. So I hope the right to investigate. This should be the power that the Legislative Yuan should have.

So in the same year. The Chief Justice also has Constitutional Interpretation No. 325. The Constitution on the Supervisory Yuan. There are only these two left. A weapon that's not very powerful. You have to steal his weapons. But the Legislative Yuan seems to be right. The Legislative Yuan is required to carry out relevant tasks. There must be some tools. So a special explanation. The Legislative Yuan has the right to access files. Of course, Brother Niu has simplified it a lot. But if you want to see the original text. You can go and take a look at it again! So in 1999. Passed the Legislative Yuan Powers Exercise Act. Inquiries and committee hearings. The right to access files is also included. Now let's fast forward in time. In 2004. That year was the presidential election. The "319 shooting incident" also broke out. In the end, although the suspect Chen Yixiong died. The case was concluded with. "the defendant's death" and no prosecution was signed. But the truth of the case is still confusing. Moreover, the vote difference was not big at that time. Between the various camps. It is also because the truth cannot be revealed. I hate it so much that my teeth itch. One side feels. After this incident. There are many more sympathy votes. Caused them to lose the election. But the other side also feels. He doesn't have to win the election. Such a risky political performance. So for this reason, the Legislative Yuan. Formed a 319 truth investigation team. This led to a constitutional controversy. Made by the Grand Justice of the Judiciary. Interpretation No. 585 Change of Opinion. The Legislative Yuan’s investigative power. Should not be limited to document access. It should include. Ask people or government officials to. Be present to give testimony or express an opinion. It's just that the relevant procedures should. be clearly defined by law. The scope and rules need to be clearly defined by law. Even if rights are granted, there must be certain restrictions. However, the Legislative Yuan has. No corresponding laws have been passed. This power cannot be implemented. This is also the latest congressional reform. The main thing in dispute. Since the Chief Justice has affirmed. The Legislative Yuan and the Control Yuan. can exercise investigative powers. So today's Legislative Yuan. The problem of weak investigative powers. It seems that the Legislative Yuan. Failure to improve legislation. The existence or abolition of the Supervisory Yuan. It doesn't seem to matter much. But here comes the problem! That's still possible. Causes big problems. Preset the better situation first. The result of the two houses sharing investigative power. Might lead to the same thing. Being investigated by both the Legislative Yuan. and the Control Yuan. This is not only a waste of national resources. It will also make the respondents exhausted. Need to accept investigations from both houses. Think of the worst case scenario. If the two houses' findings. Or the decisions they make are contradictory. Which court’s conclusion should be taken as the standard? Which house should the people trust? This is how we judge the government's political responsibility. The Democratic Progressive Party. has always supported the independence of the three powers. Advocate the abolition of the Examination Yuan. and the Supervisory Commission. Former President Tsai Ing-wen. When running for re-election, he also said. Constitutional reform abolished the Examination Yuan. The Supervisory Commission can also give priority to. Including Chen Tingfei, who was re-elected as a legislator. for several. He also proposed constitutional amendments several times. "Abolish the Examination Yuan and the Control Yuan" But they are all stillborn.

But when it comes to the Supervisory Commission. There is another controversy that must be mentioned. That was the end of 2004. The term of office of the third supervisory committee expires. The then President Chen Shui-bian. Also in accordance with the Constitution. and the provisions of the Constitutional Amendment. Nominate 29 people to the Legislative Yuan. List of Supervisory Committee Members. At that time, the Legislative Yuan. Term of office of the 5th Legislative Yuan. Only one month left. The ruling Democratic Progressive Party. The total number of seats held by the Taiwan Solidarity Union,. the pan-green camp. Only about 100 seats. No more than half. Therefore, the Kuomintang and the People First Party. They hold more than half of the seats. Not in the term. Exercise the consent power of the Supervisory Committee. After the 6th Legislative Yuan took office. Although the Presidential Palace once again. The nomination letter was sent to the Legislative Yuan. But you know. Because our Nationalist Alliance. Still holds more than half of the seats. Leading the proceedings. The Legislative Yuan's agenda was postponed several times. Therefore, the Supervisory Committee did not exercise its consent. As a result, at the end of January 2005. After the 3rd Supervisory Committee expires. The Supervisory Commission has fallen into. an idle state without a Supervisory Committee. This also angered the Democratic Progressive Party. Apply to the Chief Justice for a Constitutional Interpretation. So two years later. The Grand Justice provided an interpretation. of Interpretation No. 632. Declared the Legislative Yuan's failure to exercise. its consent unconstitutional. Deemed the Legislative Yuan to have undermined the constitutional system. Seriously request the Legislative Yuan. Take appropriate action as soon as possible. But when is the Legislative Yuan. How can the Supervisory Commission. no longer be a mosquito-ridden institution? The answer is after the change of political parties in 2008. The Ma Ying-jeou government. Provide relevant list of supervisory committee members. This finally ended the Supervisory Commission. The case of idling for 3 years and 6 months. But the list of candidates for the fourth supervisory committee. It's also full of controversy. For example, there were reports. of sexual harassment of female students. There is Xu Bingjin who evaded taxes. Chen Yaochang, who had an affair scandal. As for the candidates for the 5th Supervisory Committee in 2014,. Even people in his own party couldn't stand it. More than one-third of the members nominated by Ma Ying-jeou. A total of 11 nominees were eliminated. Symbolizes the ruling and opposition legislators. Strong backlash against Ma Ying-jeou's inappropriate nomination. Based on the proportion of legislators at that time. Assuming that the Democratic Progressive Party. and the People First Party. If everyone votes against. At least 9 digits are required. KMT legislators voted against. Appointment of the Supervisory Committee will not be passed. The subsequent 2016 supplementary nomination. And the candidates for the 6th Supervisory Committee in 2020. Each time it was passed amid controversy. This shows that the personnel case of the Supervisory Committee. It is inherently political. It is difficult to escape the political party's attack and defense. Naturally, it is hard to expect. Their professionalism and independence. But this quarrel. It also gave the people a voice. Eh? The Control Yuan, one of the five branches of government. It has been idle for three years and six months. But there doesn't seem to be any special feeling. So the voices for abolishing the Supervisory Yuan. Therefore, it is getting bigger and bigger. Of course, this. Political parties have not stopped discussing. For example, the Kuomintang. Questioning the DPP's advocacy of abolishing the examination. and procuratorate. But when in power. But the examination committee members. and the supervisory committee members. Yes, it is good to mention it.

However, without constitutional amendment. Before the abolition of the Supervisory Yuan. The power of supervision still exists. According to the results of the Supreme Court's interpretation. of the Constitution. The President and Congress have an obligation. Nomination and review must be carried out in accordance. with the Constitution. It is the president's duty. to nominate the examination committee members. More than just rights. So if the president is passive and doesn't nominate. Or our Legislative Yuan. Passive non-exercise of consent. It will make it impossible for the Supervisory Commission. to exercise its powers. It is the destruction of the country's constitutional system. It is not allowed by the Constitution. Although the interpretation of No. 632. It is aimed at the Supervisory Commission. But the Examination Yuan is also a constitutional institution. So of course it also applies. Or as mentioned before. Now the issue is raised again. Want to compare the economical mode. Freeze personnel first. Ways to reduce your budget. Let the two examination and supervision institutes become history. But everyone! When the province was streamlined,. the constitution was amended first. Give the economy legal legitimacy. So no matter which mode you choose. The constitution must be amended! Finally, let's talk. We think the Supervisory Commission. Should it be abolished or not? Our Supervisory Commission. Just like this,. Acquired disorders. Even though the tooth was extracted. But it is still in a difficult situation. To clarify the overall governance. Make certain contributions to safeguarding human rights. Although the Supervisory Commission has been in operation till now. Constantly constrained by institutional deficiencies. Make bricks without straw. I want to do things but I don't have the tools. The Supervisory Commission has already become. People are facing mismanagement. or when treated unfairly. Our important complaint channel. Here is some data for you guys. Our current supervisory committee. Every year, the. More than 18,000 petition letters. This is also a good thing for our administrative organs. When implementing policies. Able to be reinvestigated and reviewed. In the process of supervising administration. The Supervisory Commission provides us with. Guarantee of relatively good administration. Therefore, international monitoring organizations. Actively promote in countries around the world. Establish an independent and professional monitoring body. The issue of whether to abolish or retain the Control Yuan. It’s not a multiple-choice question of “keep” or “discard”. It's a rather important question. We have to think carefully. Big Questions about Government Syste. and Checks and Balances. If we want to abolish the Supervisory Yuan. Transfer of power to the Legislative Yuan. Give the Legislative Yuan full congressional powers. You have to think carefully about that. How to make corresponding checks and balances. Thinking deeply. How to design a. Implementing the system of supervisory power. and safeguarding human rights. If it's not useless,. Should the Supervisory Commission be asked to. Re-attach its teeth? Improve the selection system. Let it execute well. What about the rights granted to it by the people? These are our problems. It must be carefully expanded and examined. Rather than just following the political offensive and defensive. Just go with the flow. Okay! That’s all for today. If you like. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership.

Or click Super Thanks! In addition, our DC group is now open! Welcome everyone to come in and chat. My study notes. See you next time. ByeBye！

最近國會改革的聲浪

只能說是轟轟烈烈啊！

有些人說是國會改革

也有人說是立委擴權

但這一切都眾說紛紜

其中一方的論點

是說立委需要調查權

他們的主張是因為

監察院的權力不彰

算是個閒置組織

或是已經淪為東廠

以及打手之類的論調

但事情真的是這樣嗎

今天就來讓我們聊聊監察院！

#台灣 #臺灣 #中華民國 #中國 #立法院 #監察院 #三民主義 #五權分立 #考試院 #立法 #監察 #質詢 #監督 #彈劾 #糾舉 #審計 #廢考監 #東廠 #陳菊 #監察委員 #大法官 #事件 #585號 #青鳥 #青鳥行動 #藍鷹

資料來源：

黎淑慧（2018）。談立法院調查權。《管理資訊計算》，第 7 卷，

陳清雲（2015）。立法院調查權法制化之立法建議。《軍法專刊》，第 61 卷

李寧修（2018）。論國會調查權的革新與展望。《政大法評論》，第 154 期

吳秀玲（2006）。論我國監察權的演變與未來發展方向。《國家發展研究》

呂文玲(2020)。廢止監察院及其職權移轉之修憲方向研析。《立法院法制局研究成果議題研析》

東方翔（2021）。我國監察委員行使糾正權和彈劾權之實證分析。國立政治大學政治學系碩士學位論文

黃揚明(2017)。那些年　被立法院刷掉的監委總整理（上）。鏡傳媒《https://www.mirrormedia.mg/story/20170303inv001》

黃揚明(2017)。那些年　被立法院刷掉的監委總整理（下）。鏡傳媒《https://www.mirrormedia.mg/story/20170303inv002》

李宜芳（2020）。四張圖表告訴你 為民伸冤的監察院為何不受信任。https://reurl.cc/3j59Wj

法律白話文運動(2022)。先天不良又後天失調的監察院，廢了它？《法律白話文運動》https://plainlaw.me/posts/Control-Yuan

Hello everyone! I am Aniu. Recent calls for congressional reform. I can only say it was a grand event! Some people say it is congressional reform. Some people also say that it is the legislators' expansion of power. But all this is controversial. Of course, we also want to do this topic. But the amount of data is too large. Please allow us to let the bullets fly for a while! One side's argument. It means that legislators need investigative powers. Their claim is that. The power of the Supervisory Yuan is not obvious. It's an idle organization. Or has it become the East Factory? And arguments like thugs. But is this really the case? Let’s talk about the Supervisory Commission today! First, let’s talk about. The original intention of establishing the Supervisory Yuan. Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the country,. led the Chinese revolution. The world's democratic countries can be roughly divided into. Presidential and Cabinet Systems. However, our country's constitution was written. by Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the country. It is said to combine the advantages of cabinet system. and presidential system. The separation of three powers was changed to five powers. Added a comparison. The system applicable to China. That is, the right to examine and the right to supervise. The right to take the exam is to avoid. Administrative organs commit corruption for personal gain. Therefore, separate the test and use. Separate examination authority from administrative authority. The power of supervision is to prevent abuse by Congress. Therefore, referring to the ancient imperial censor system. Separate the Control Yuan from Congress. Forming a five-power constitution that is unique in the world. So we have the Executive Yuan and the Legislative Yuan. Judicial Yuan, Examination Yuan. The Board of Audit and Inspection and other five agencies. According to the principle of separation of five powers in the Constitution. The Supervisory Yuan is responsible for political conduct and rectification. It also supervises audits, property declarations, etc. Clarify the issues of official administration,. eliminate malpractices and promote benefits. The 17th year of the Republic of China. The Northern Expedition was completed and the country was unified. The National Government began. to implement the five-power separation. At the very beginning. The Court of Auditors. The Supervisory Yuan was established in 1931. And abolished the Audit Office. Became the Audit Department. Affiliated to the Supervisory Yuan. This is the highest supervisory body of the National Government. Exercise of impeachment and audit powers. After 26 years of war against Japan. Master the two powers of reporting and making suggestions. Constitution of the Republic of China. It came into effect on December 25, 1947. According to the provisions of the Constitution. By the provincial and municipal councils, Mongolia. Tibetan Local Council. Overseas Chinese groups also elected the first Supervisory Committee. And on June 5, 1948. The Control Yuan after the Constitution was formally established. At the very beginning of the Constitution. The Supervisory Yuan in various regions and provinces. Each district has its own supervisory committee office. April 1949. The Supervisory Yuan first moved from Nanjing to Guangzhou. What happened in 1938? Everyone knows it. December: Government transferred to Taiwan. After the official start of work. The original 180 members. Supervisory committee members who have come to Taiwan. Only 104 people. But after arriving in Taiwan. Do you think they are starting to enjoy their life? Actually, no. These supervisory committee members are not idle. The most famous one is. In 1952. They impeached the then Vice President Li Zongren. The reason is that Li Zongren, acting president,. violated the law and failed to perform his duties. But in fact, after the government moved to Taiwan. He never came to Taiwan. People are still in the United States!

最近國會改革的聲浪

只能說是轟轟烈烈啊！

有些人說是國會改革

也有人說是立委擴權

但這一切都眾說紛紜

其中一方的論點

是說立委需要調查權

他們的主張是因為

監察院的權力不彰

算是個閒置組織

或是已經淪為東廠

以及打手之類的論調

但事情真的是這樣嗎

今天就來讓我們聊聊監察院！

#台灣 #臺灣 #中華民國 #中國 #立法院 #監察院 #三民主義 #五權分立 #考試院 #立法 #監察 #質詢 #監督 #彈劾 #糾舉 #審計 #廢考監 #東廠 #陳菊 #監察委員 #大法官 #事件 #585號 #青鳥 #青鳥行動 #藍鷹

黎淑慧（2018）。談立法院調查權。《管理資訊計算》，第 7 卷，

吳秀玲（2006）。論我國監察權的演變與未來發展方向。《國家發展研究》

呂文玲(2020)。廢止監察院及其職權移轉之修憲方向研析。《立法院法制局研究成果議題研析》

東方翔（2021）。我國監察委員行使糾正權和彈劾權之實證分析。國立政治大學政治學系碩士學位論文
